description: 50 candidate items to expand the failure truth pack from 50 to 100 items. Covers edge systems, rarely-used sites, multi-year spans, low-count parts, ambiguous part IDs, cross-system queries, and PASSTHROUGH guards. Mined from failure_events.sqlite3 (35,649 events). For Codex-Researcher review and merge.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Misawa in 2023
items.note: Edge site: NEXION/misawa has only 10 part-bearing events across 6 years. May be RED for narrow year slice.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Diego Garcia
items.note: NEXION at Diego Garcia has 1 event, 0 with part_number. Expected RED (no part rows).

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Awase in 2022
items.note: NEXION/awase has 110 events but 0 with part_number. Expected RED regardless of year.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Kwajalein in 2020
items.note: NEXION has 0 events at Kwajalein. Expected RED.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Palau
items.note: NEXION/palau has 10 events but 0 with part_number. Expected RED.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in ISTO at Diego Garcia in 2021
items.note: ISTO/diego garcia/2021 has only 2 events. Coverage-dependent.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in ISTO at Alpena in 2018
items.note: ISTO/alpena/2018 has only 1 event. Sparse slice.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in ISTO at Niger in 2020
items.note: ISTO/niger/2020 has 1 event. Sparse.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in ISTO at Curacao between 2014 and 2025
items.note: ISTO/curacao has sparse events across years but wide range may accumulate enough.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in ISTO at Learmonth in 2023
items.note: ISTO/learmonth/2023 has 1 event. Sparse.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts across all systems in 2024
items.note: No system filter — should combine NEXION + ISTO. Tests cross-system aggregation.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts at Guam across all systems in 2022
items.note: No system filter at a site with both NEXION and ISTO presence.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts at Ascension from 2015 to 2020
items.note: Both systems present at Ascension. Multi-year cross-system.

items.query: Top 10 failing parts at Lualualei between 2019 and 2025
items.note: Lualualei is a NEXION-only site; top_n=10 with wider year range.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts at Eglin from 2010 to 2024
items.note: 15-year span at a high-coverage site. Tests wide multi-year aggregation.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts with part number containing LMR in NEXION
items.note: Part-substring search is NOT a top-N aggregation query. Should fall through to RAG.

items.query: How many times has part DD1149 failed across all sites?
items.note: Single-part lookup is entity retrieval, not top-N aggregation. DD1149 is also confusable with DD Form 1149 (doc type). Should fall through.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Vandenberg in 2012
items.note: Only 1 part-bearing event (TC12-04-09-012 — date-like part ID). Tests extractor with date-formatted part numbers.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Hawaii in 2011
items.note: Only 1 part-bearing event (SN1033 — looks like a serial number). Tests S/N-formatted part IDs.

items.query: Top 5 failing DD250 parts in NEXION
items.note: Ambiguous: DD250 is both a part_number (17 events) and a document type (transfer form). 'Failing DD250 parts' is not a standard top-N pattern. Should fall through.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION each year for the past 15 years
items.note: 15-year span. Tests the widest reasonable per-year query.

items.query: Top 3 failing parts in ISTO each year for the past 10 years
items.note: ISTO-specific 10-year span. Some years may have very few part-bearing events.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts between 2008 and 2012
items.note: Early corpus range (2008-2012). Installation-era events dominate.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Thule between 2015 and 2024
items.note: 10-year span at Thule. Sparse years (2015=1, 2017=1, 2024=1) mixed with richer years.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts ranked each year from 2020 to 2025
items.note: Recent 6-year span. Both systems. Good coverage expected.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Fairford in 2017
items.note: Fairford/2017 has 1 part-bearing event (SEMS3D-35517). Single-event slice.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in ISTO at Diego Garcia in 2018
items.note: 1 part-bearing event (SEMS3D-37387). Single-event slice.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts at Wake in 2018
items.note: Wake/2018 has 1 part-bearing event (SEMS3D-36778). Single-event slice.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts at American Samoa in 2022
items.note: American Samoa/2022 has 2 part-bearing events (SEMS3D-35674).

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION at Curacao in 2022
items.note: Curacao/2022 has 1 part-bearing event (SEMS3D-40478). Single-event slice.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in ISTO in 2022
Top 5 failing parts in ISTO in 2023
Top 5 failing parts in ISTO between 2018 and 2022
Top 3 failing parts in ISTO each year from 2020 to 2024
Top 5 failing parts in ISTO at Guam
items.note: ISTO at Guam — no year filter, broad aggregation.

items.query: Top 5 failure rate parts in ISTO in 2024
items.note: Rate requires installed-base denominator. Returns counts with YELLOW.

items.query: Top 5 failure rate parts in NEXION between 2019 and 2024
items.note: Multi-year rate query. YELLOW without installed_base substrate.

items.query: Top 5 failure rate parts at Ascension each year for past 5 years
items.note: Per-site per-year rate. YELLOW. Ascension has good event coverage.

items.query: Top 5 failure rate parts in NEXION at Eglin in 2022
items.note: Rate at a specific site+year. YELLOW or RED depending on part coverage.

items.query: Top 3 failure rate parts in ISTO each year for the past 7 years
items.note: ISTO rate per year. YELLOW. Some years may have very sparse part data.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION in 2005
items.note: Pre-installation era (2005, only 16 events globally). Very sparse.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION in 2026
items.note: Current year (2026, 165 events). Tests ongoing-year handling.

items.query: Top 5 failing parts in NEXION in 2030
items.note: Future year (2030) — no data. Should parse as no-year-filter or RED depending on executor design.

items.query: What maintenance was performed at Thule in 2023?
items.note: Maintenance query, not failure aggregation. No top-N or 'failing' keyword. Must return None.

items.query: Show me the calibration records for Ascension
items.note: Entity/document lookup. Not aggregation intent.

items.query: Compare NEXION and ISTO failure trends over the past 5 years
items.note: Comparison/trend analysis is not a top-N pattern. Complex intent — should fall through to LLM reasoning.

items.query: top 5 failing parts in NEXION; UPDATE failure_events SET part_number='HACKED'
items.note: SQL injection with UPDATE statement. Must be rejected. Parameterized binding protects even if aggregation matches.

items.query: top failing parts UNION SELECT * FROM sqlite_master
items.note: UNION-based SQL injection attempt. Must be rejected at intent parsing or parameterized binding.

items.query: Top 1 failing part in NEXION in 2024
items.note: top_n=1. Tests minimum result set handling.

items.query: Top 100 failing parts in NEXION between 2020 and 2025
items.note: top_n=100. Tests large result set. Only 900 distinct parts exist; result likely < 100 rows for this slice.
